subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! Due to a multitude of occupations, there remaineth not the leisure for continuous correspondence. Let it not be imagined that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی از کثرت مشاغل فرصت تحاریر مستمره نیست مبادا گمان کنی که
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @praise and encouragement, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
